data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for upgrade offers at entry, which is explicitly stated in the use case. However, the evidence does not include any confirmation that the system presents upgrade offers when a member exceeds their usage limit. The only relevant evidence is the description of the system's behavior when the limit is reached, but it does not confirm that the upgrade offer is presented as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that upgrade offers are presented at entry when the usage limit is reached.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate upgrade offer presentation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the system presents an upgrade offer when a member attempts entry after exceeding their usage limit.
